info.title: Farmers Market API
info.description: Backend API for the Farm-Connect Farmers Market platform (Nigeria)

post.description:
Register a new customer or vendor account.
Creates the Supabase Auth user, then inserts a profile row.

Authenticate a user with email/password.
Returns the Supabase session object containing the access_token.

get.description:
Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Requires a valid Bearer token in the Authorization header.

post.description:
Generate a 4-digit OTP, store it on the user's profile, and send it via email.
OTP expires after 10 minutes.
Verify a 4-digit OTP code. Marks the email as verified on success.
Sign the current user out (invalidates the session on Supabase).

get.description:
Public: browse approved products with optional filtering.
Excludes products from suspended vendors.

post.description: Vendors or Admins upload a new product listing.

get.description: Public: get a single product's full detail.

patch.description:
Update a product. Vendors may only update their own listings.
Admins may update any product.

delete.description: Delete a product. Vendors may only delete their own. Admins may delete any.

patch.description:
Update the image URL of a product listing.

Typical flow:
  1. Vendor calls POST /uploads/image with the image file  → receives a public URL
  2. Vendor calls PATCH /products/{id}/image with { "image_url": "<url>" }

Vendors may only update images for their own products.
Admins may update any product.
Admin only: approve, reject, or suspend a product listing.

get.description:
Return orders relevant to the caller's role:
- customer  → only their own orders
- vendor    → orders containing their products
- admin     → all orders

post.description:
Place a new order. Deducts the total from the customer's wallet balance
and creates order + order_items rows atomically.

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific order.

patch.description:
Update the status of an order.
Vendors can move orders through: Processing → In Transit → Delivered
Admins can set any status including Cancelled.

get.description:
Return all registered vendor profiles.
Admin access only.
Return the full profile of the authenticated vendor.

patch.description: Allow a vendor to update their own profile details and bank info.

get.description: Public endpoint: Get a vendor's profile and their approved products.

patch.description:
Admin: Update any vendor's profile fields (name, contact, location, rating, etc.).
Addresses the gap where admin profile edits were previously local-only.
Admin: Approve, suspend, or reactivate a vendor account.

get.description: Return the current wallet balance for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Credit the customer's wallet by the specified amount.
In production, validate the payment gateway reference before crediting.
Initialize a Paystack transaction for a wallet top-up.
Verify Paystack transaction and credit wallet on success.
Handle Paystack webhook callbacks for transaction verification.

Vendor: Request a payout of available wallet balance to their bank account.
Deducts the requested amount from the vendor's wallet and logs the transaction.

get.description: Return the transaction history for the authenticated user's wallet.

Return platform-wide KPI summary for the admin dashboard.
Includes total orders, revenue, active vendor count, and customer count.

Return a breakdown of GMV grouped by the specified period.
Delegates to a Supabase SQL function 'fn_revenue_by_period' if available,
otherwise returns raw order data for the frontend to aggregate.
Return vendor performance ranking by revenue contributed.

delete.description:
Delete a previously uploaded product image from Supabase Storage.

- Pass the full public URL returned by `POST /uploads/image` as the `url` query param.
- Vendors may only delete images inside their own `products/{vendor_id}/` prefix.
- Admins may delete any image.

get.description: List disputes relevant to caller's role.

post.description: Open a dispute for a specified order (buyers or sellers).

get.description: Fetch comprehensive dispute record with notes and evidence.

post.description: Add a note or comment to an open dispute audit trail.
Attach photo or document evidence to a dispute (via multipart upload or JSON payload).

patch.description:
Admin endpoint to log resolution notes and select outcome before closing a dispute.
Triggers automated wallet reconciliation based on resolution_outcome.

Persist platform-wide configuration (fees, bonuses, gateway mode).
Called by the admin settings tab.

file.title: File
file.description: JPEG, PNG, or WebP image — max 5 MB
